content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.12%, BankNifty -1.13%, VIX +9.2% to 18.39 — broad risk-off with Realty/PSU Bank/Energy leading the drop. Defensive pockets working: IT (+0.24%), Pharma (+0.42%), and select FMCG (TATACONSUM, MARICO, DABUR) on Q4 prints. Existing book is well-positioned defensively (FMCG/IT/Pharma/Capital Goods winners), so priority is locking in COFORGE gains and trailing SLs on winners rather than adding sector risk into a falling tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340,
      "new_target": 1450,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.7% on blockbuster Q4 (PAT +134% YoY, FY27 EBITDA >20.5% guidance, Sabre $1.56B ramp, Cigniti merger effective). CMP 1380.60, current SL 1360 sits only 1.5% below CMP (Rule 17(c) trail-gap floor is 1.0%, so 1360 is technically valid but tight). Move SL up to 1340 — 2.9% below CMP — to give the breakout room to breathe while still locking in +6.4% vs entry 1259. Keep target 1450; intraday VWAP 1377 holding, sector defensive. This is a tighten consistent with the trailing-SL mandate at +9.7% unrealized."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832,
      "new_target": 870,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.0% at new 52w high 846.15, strong Q4 (rev +22%, India vol +9%, intl CC +19%), MOFSL TP implies 15% upside. Current SL 832 is at entry+1.5% (breakeven+), CMP 844.75 gives 1.5% trail gap — at the floor. No-op on SL (832 = stored 832 not allowed per micro-adjust rule) — instead extending target from 860 to 870 to reflect the post-Q4 momentum and MOFSL 15% upside path. New R:R from current: (870-844.75)/(844.75-832) = 25.25/12.75 = 1.98 — still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.6% at new 52w high 1274.50, strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY record, FY26 PAT +148%, EBITDA margin 26.8% vs 20.1%), CDMO momentum + GLP-1 peptide tailwind. Current SL 1255 is at +2.4% above entry (locked in), 1.2% below CMP 1269.80 — within the 1% trail-gap floor for tightness but acceptable. Not modifying further to avoid same-session forced exit pattern. Let the breakout run; SL above entry already protects."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.2%, CMP 123.65, SL 121.00 (-2.1% from CMP). Gold in 1-month correction (-7.45%) but VIX spiking +9.2% today provides some safe-haven bid. Thesis (geopolitical / FX hedge) intact, SL placement absorbs normal noise. Per Rule 17, do not front-run SL on intraday wobble. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF flat, CMP 2787, SL 2740 (-1.7%). Q4 print solid (FY26 PAT +47%), 15-20% chem growth guidance, Rs 2,300 Cr refrigerant capex. MS Underweight is a watch-item but not new info. SL gives 1.7% room; not tightening yet — needs to clear day high 2832 first for trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5%, CMP 9058, SL 8950 (-1.2% from CMP, just above floor). FY26 PAT +32%, Rs 47/share record dividend, MOFSL TP 9110. Capital goods sector weak today (ABB/SIEMENS down hard) but POLYCAB holding up on fundamentals. SL placement appropriate; not trailing tighter to avoid forced-exit on sector noise. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.4%, CMP 10606, SL 10440 (-1.6%). Buyback at Rs 12,000 (+13% to CMP) + Rs 150 dividend, record date May 29 — strong price floor. Q4 PAT +34% standalone. Auto sector weak today (-1.33%) but thesis intact; buyback creates near-term technical support. SL gives 1.6% room; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.0%, CMP 477.25, SL 468 (-1.9% from CMP). Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance upgrade to low double-digit, Rs 5.50 final dividend. Approaching SL but thesis intact and FMCG sector momentum positive. Per Rule 17, hold to SL — do not pre-empt. Daily intraday made low 474.30 and recovered."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM -0.4%, CMP 1243.40, SL 1198 (-3.7%). Q4 PAT +21.5% record, OPM 14.58% record, Rs 10 final dividend. Made new 52w high 1253.60 intraday before pullback. Thesis intact; SL gives ample room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.3%, CMP 862.30, SL 850 (-1.4%). Q4 print strong (PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY, $99M Tallgrass data-center order), 3.2x volume holding up vs sector weakness. SL gives 1.4% room — at floor but acceptable. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.1%, CMP 8084.50, SL 7950 (-1.7%). Near 52w high, HSBC TP 9000, Q4 board May 20 (>3 sessions away, no binary rule trigger yet). Healthcare sector outperforming. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 20,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1240,
      "stop_loss": 1198,
      "target": 1310,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Adding to existing TATACONSUM position on strong Q4 catalyst — PAT +21.5%, record OPM, Morgan Stanley positive, breakout from 1220 prior 52w high on 0.9x volume. Adding 20 shares at 1240 (below CMP 1243, intraday VWAP 1232) keeps total holding at 60 shares × ~1246 avg = ~7.4% of portfolio (within 20% cap). SL 1198 (-3.4%), target 1310 (+5.6%), R:R = 70/42 = 1.67. Risk budget: 7.4% × 3.4% = 0.25% of portfolio — well within 0.5% cap. FMCG cluster currently MARICO+DABUR+TATACONSUM at ~14% combined, room remains. Cash deployment moves toward 48% — addresses Rule 18 admit discipline on a qualifying BULLISH-rated (+0.05) name in a defensive sector on a risk-off day."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BIOCON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just out (May 7-8) with headline PAT -56.8% YoY due to exceptional charges. Leadership transition (new CEO Apr 1, successor named) introduces execution uncertainty. Intraday recovered from 9% gap-down to currently +3.5% but volatile post-event chop. Wait for next session for cleaner setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Mid-cap IT in heavy sector drawdown (-23% YTD), MACD bearish crossover, price below SMA20. Even though IT defensive today, the structural setup is weak. No edge to chase a +2.36% intraday rebound in a stock down -11.7% over 6 months."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week low — contrarian thesis requires confirmed reversal, not just a bounce. No data deep-dive provided to confirm setup. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results tomorrow (May 12) — binary event within 1 session. Per Rule 11, no new entry into a 3-session binary unless explicit event-trade sizing with conf >=0.70. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma cluster already at LAURUSLABS + (BIOCON skipped); adding SUNPHARMA on the same defensive-pharma thesis in a single risk-off session would build a same-cluster stack. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamental catalyst (Q4 PAT +291% YoY) but no data deep-dive provided; without chart/level data cannot define entry/SL/target with discipline. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Healthcare diagnostics +7.3% — momentum candidate but APOLLOHOSP already held providing healthcare exposure. Same-cluster stack risk on a risk-off day. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma cluster — same skip rationale as SUNPHARMA. LAURUSLABS already represents pharma momentum in the book."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "IT defensive today but COFORGE already held providing IT exposure with stronger Q4 print. Adding INFY would stack IT cluster without incremental edge."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Broad market down 1%+ with VIX +9.2% — adding broad-market beta on a risk-off day is the wrong vector. Defensive single names with Q4 catalysts (TATACONSUM add) is the cleaner expression. Skip NIFTYBEES."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "new_stop_loss": 0,
      "new_target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY 600x HFCL LIMIT 133.50 placed 7672 minutes ago (~5+ days ago, stale across sessions). MIS orders should be intraday only; this is a stale pending order that should be cancelled. Flagging for cancellation in portfolio_notes — order should not stack into today's book. (Schema doesn't support CANCEL via decisions, noting in portfolio_notes.)"
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1360 to 1340 — gives breakout 2.9% room while locking in +6.4% vs entry. Avoids Rule 17(c) sub-1% trail-gap forced-exit risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 832,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry+1.5% already protects. Target extended to 870 to reflect MOFSL 15% upside. No SL change (no-op MODIFY rule)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry+2.4% locked. At 52w high, let breakout run. Will reassess on next swing high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact (VIX spike + geopolitical hedge). SL gives 2.1% room. Do not pre-empt SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740,
      "reasoning": "Flat day, intraday recovered from 2739 low. Thesis intact; SL placement appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950,
      "reasoning": "FY26 PAT +32%, Rs 47 record dividend. Capital goods sector noise; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 creates price floor; SL gives 1.6% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 468,
      "reasoning": "Q4 + FY27 guidance upgrade thesis intact. SL gives 1.9% room — do not pre-empt per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1198,
      "reasoning": "Record Q4 print, made new 52w high intraday. SL gives 3.7% room. Adding 20 more shares via separate BUY."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 850,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (+32% PAT, $99M Tallgrass order, OB +61% YoY). 3.2x volume holding up vs sector weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 7950,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, HSBC TP 9000, board May 20 (>3 sessions). Healthcare sector working."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DRREDDY skipped — Q4 binary tomorrow (Rule 11). BIOCON skipped — post-results volatility, wait next session. PERSISTENT/HCLTECH IT names skipped — structural sector weakness, prefer COFORGE already held. SUNPHARMA/TORNTPHARM/LALPATHLAB skipped — pharma/healthcare cluster already represented by LAURUSLABS + APOLLOHOSP. MCX — strong fundamental but no chart data; revisit next pulse. INFY skipped — IT already covered by COFORGE.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment moves from 45% toward ~48% after TATACONSUM add — still well below 80% soft target but aligned with risk-off tape (VIX +9.2%, Nifty -1.12%). Book is heavily defensive: FMCG (MARICO/DABUR/TATACONSUM ~16%), IT (COFORGE ~3.8%), Pharma (LAURUSLABS ~2%), Healthcare (APOLLOHOSP ~4.8%), Capital Goods (POLYCAB/CGPOWER ~9.2%), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO ~4.2%), Chemicals (SRF ~3.9%), Gold ETF (GOLDBEES ~4.9%). No single sector >35%. COFORGE SL trail locks in gains on the standout winner. STALE MIS ORDER: HFCL BUY 600x MIS LIMIT 133.50 has been OPEN for 7672 minutes (~5 days) — this is a stale cross-session order that should have been auto-cancelled by MIS rules; flagging for manual cancel. No new MIS orders entered. Win rate 13% over rolling 5 days is concerning — discipline of holding SLs and not pre-empting (Rule 17) is the corrective behavior."
}
